violations.text: At the time of inspection, the following food items were observed improperly cooling... - Hamburgers (From Lunch) observed cooling in a large plastic container covered with tin foil at 98 degrees Fahrenehet - Pureed Green Beans and Sweet & Sour Chicken (Just pureed) were observed in covered pans in the reach-in cooler at 70 degrees Fahrnheit - Pasta salad was observed (cooling from lunch service) in covered tin pans at 45-46 degrees Fahrenheit Food items were all placed in shallow pans, uncovered, and arranged in the walk-in cooler for rapid cooling at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

The non-food-contact surfaces of the slotted vent in the kitchen 2-door reach-in cooler were observed to have an accumulation of dust. Non-food-contact surfaces are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to preclude the build of soil and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Previously prepared grilled cheese sandwiches were observed held in the 2 Door Reach-In Cooler for greater than 7 days beyond the preparation on the container. PIC voluntarily disposed of the grilled cheeses at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The Chemical Dispenser used for floor cleaning was observed to be mounted on the wall directly above the food prep sink. Chemicals must be stored/located in a way to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Per the PIC, call is to be made to have dispenser relocated same day. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The following nonfood-contact surfaces were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - The dish area fan shrouds - The top of the dish machine - The underside of the mixer - Surfaces of the blender stand/unit Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2024

The wall mounted Soda Gun Holder mounted to the wall over a kitchen prep table was observed to be lacking a drain tube. Drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The wall in the dish area and behind the mixer in the side prep area was observed to have an accumulation of dust, soil residue, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
The floor in the ice machine area is in poor repair. Floor tiles observed to be cracked/chipped. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

At the time of inspection, Pureed Turkey was observed held at 126 degrees Fahrenheit at the Hot Hold Steam Table. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Pureed Turkey was placed in the oven for proper reheating at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023

At the time of inspection, several food items in the single door cooler was observed held at 43 to 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. (Food items observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit and below were moved to colder refrigeration. Food items observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit and over were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023

At the time of inspection, the single door cooler in the kitchen area was not in good repair/properly adjusted. The ambient temperature of the unit was observed to be 45 degrees Fahrenheit with the food temperatures observed to be 43 to 49 degrees Fahrenheit. All food items were removed from the refrigeration unit at the time of inspection. Unit to be kept out of service until adjusted/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
At the time of inspection, the non-food contact surfaces of the mixer were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2023
